title: Bláznova kronika
writer: Pavel Jurácek, Radovan Krátky, Milos Macourek
actors: Petr Kostka, Emília Vásáryová, Miroslav Holub
plot: Karel Zeman's brilliant animation, cowritten with Jurácek: ironic, surreal, following the adventures of a plowboy and a mercenary to the battlefields of the Thirty Years War.
